rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (8/10) and surface materially the same picture: strong software development background, AI and cloud project experience, and a notable open-source presence including GISCollective. The shifted concerns (AI strategy, cloud implementation strategy, advisory/strategic roles) are reworded variations on the baseline's concerns about lacking strategic, large-scale, director-level AI/cloud experience — well within ordinary run-to-run phrasing noise. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or anything keyed to the Berlin→São Paulo change.
